systemicFailures.label: Private testing & selective disclosure
systemicFailures.stat_label: Meta variants tested before LLaMA-4 launch
systemicFailures.detail: Providers can test multiple private variants and only release the best.

systemicFailures.label: Silent model deprecation
systemicFailures.detail: Removal without notification breaks the consistency of the comparison set.

systemicFailures.label: Benchmark overfitting
systemicFailures.stat_label: relative gain on ArenaHard from extra Arena data
systemicFailures.detail: Providers with more Arena data tune harder to the benchmark, not to general tasks.

systemicFailures.label: Data-access asymmetry
systemicFailures.stat_label: of all votes go to two providers
systemicFailures.detail: Google ~19.2% + OpenAI ~20.4%, while 83 open-weight models share ~29.7%.
